text.title: Error Handling in VUI Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the methodology end-to-end.

step.name: catalogue-intents
step.action: List every intent + at least 2 example utterances per intent.

step.name: author-misrecognition-ladder
step.action: Write 3 distinct rung prompts; rung 2 includes example phrases.

step.name: author-no-input-ladder
step.action: Author 3 distinct no-input prompts focused on presence.

step.name: wire-escalation
step.action: Connect rung 3 to visual / DTMF / human channel; verify end-to-end.

step.name: test-recovery
step.action: Run vui-testing-best-practices tier-1 deterministic suite on each ladder.
step.decision-gate: If pass rate <90%, fix ladders before publish.
